name: n8n
compose:
name: slashnode-n8n
services:
  server:
    image: n8nio/n8n:2.27.4
    container_name: server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
      N8N_HOST: $DEVICE_DOMAIN_NAME
      N8N_SECURE_COOKIE: 'false'
      N8N_DIAGNOSTICS_ENABLED: 'false'
      N8N_ENFORCE_SETTINGS_FILE_PERMISSIONS: 'true'
      N8N_PROXY_HOPS: '1'
    volumes:
      - server_data:/home/node/.n8n
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:5678:5678
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data:
    name: slashnode-n8n_server_data
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (n8n). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://n8n.io.
